Synthetic fixture provenance
===========================

| Fixture | Source | License | Notes |
|---------|--------|---------|-------|
| `dft2dxf-testkit` builders | Generated in tests | MIT OR Apache-2.0 | Preferred CI fixtures |
| `malformed/*.bin` | Hand-crafted bytes | MIT OR Apache-2.0 | Negative metadata tests |

Real-world Solid Edge `.dft` samples require explicit redistribution permission before commit.
